# Win Theme Patterns

Verb-led, customer-language, discriminator-backed. Examples organized by `customer_priority` archetype.

## Mission Readiness

- "Restore mission-ready aircraft availability to 85% in Q1 by deploying our pre-positioned spares network at all 4 OCONUS bases."

## Cybersecurity

- "Maintain continuous ATO posture by automating NIST SP 800-53 control evidence collection — eliminating annual recertification scrambles."

## Cost / Affordability

- "Cut steady-state O&M cost 18% in year 2 by retiring three legacy systems with our IL5 cloud-native replacement (proven at NAVAIR W912-1234)."

## Schedule

- "Deliver IOC 90 days ahead of the threshold using our pre-trained transition team — same team that hit 60-day phase-in on Contract X (CPARS Exceptional)."

## Workforce

- "Eliminate clearance-related staffing gaps by transitioning 87% of incumbent personnel on Day 1, all with active TS/SCI."

## Anti-patterns (reject)

- "World-class solutions" — no verb, no customer outcome
- "Innovative cybersecurity" — adjective-noun, no proof
- "Best-in-class team" — unverifiable, generic
